Interface IRasterDataset

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster dataset.

[Guid("7ACA3D01-0629-11D2-8D24-0000F8780535")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterDataset

Properties

CompleteName

The full path of the RasterDataset.

string CompleteName { get; }

Property Value

string

Sample Snippet

CompressionType

The compression technique applied to this RasterDataset.

string CompressionType { get; }

string

Sample Snippet

Format

The format of this RasterRataset.

string Format { get; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

SensorType

The sensor type used for this RasterDataset.

string SensorType { get; }

Property Value

string
